Privacy
Home/Who we serve

Who we serve

The teams that manage, build, and operate commercial buildings

Opticable works in occupied buildings, active construction sites, and properties already in operation. Our clients are the people who need the systems to work without unpleasant surprises.

Request a quoteServices

Who we serve

Opticable designs, installs, and manages technology systems for commercial buildings, with long-term support after commissioning.

We work in occupied buildings, mixed-use sites, and environments where continuity of operations matters.

Who we serve

Businesses, offices, and retail spaces

You manage an office, a retail space, or a reception area and you need security, WiFi, and communications to stay reliable every day.

  • Cameras for entries and interior areas
  • Access control for restricted spaces
  • WiFi sized for your space
  • Cabling and IP telephony for workstations

Who we serve

Multi-tenant buildings and controlled-entry residences

You manage a residential or mixed-use building and need reliable entry systems, camera coverage in common areas, and infrastructure that holds up to daily use.

  • Video intercom and access control for lobby entries
  • Cameras in common areas and parking
  • WiFi for shared spaces
  • Suite cabling and common-area infrastructure

Who we serve

Commercial buildings and multi-tenant properties

You own or manage a commercial property with multiple tenants and shared systems. We install the building systems, not just one tenant system in isolation.

  • Cameras for common spaces and the perimeter
  • Access control for main entries
  • Network infrastructure for technical rooms
  • Cabling for leased spaces

Who we serve

Property managers and multi-building teams

You manage several properties and need a partner that understands the constraints: occupied buildings, tenant accommodation, standards to maintain, and budgets to respect.

  • Upgrades in active buildings
  • Portfolio-wide standardization
  • Planned interventions
  • One contact for multiple projects

Who we serve

Developers and general contractors

You are building or renovating a property and need the technology systems coordinated with the other trades, without delays.

  • Coordination with electricians and other trades
  • Structured cabling aligned with construction phases
  • Cameras, access control, and intercom delivered on schedule
  • Complete documentation at handoff

Case studies

Case studies — How we approach different project types

Here are representative example projects. Every building is different, but these scenarios illustrate our approach and the systems we deploy based on the context.

Office building

Office building with MikroTik routing, Omada WiFi and switching, and a unified UniFi stack for cameras and access.

View case study

Multi-tenant building

Multi-tenant property with UniFi Access, UniFi cameras, and Omada WiFi in the common areas.

View case study

Retail and sales floor

Retail space with a unified UniFi security platform, Omada WiFi, and MikroTik routing.

View case study

Construction site

Construction site coordinated in phases around MikroTik, Omada, and a unified UniFi security stack.

View case study

Contact us

Do you have a project type that is not listed here?

We also work in hospitality, institutional environments, and industrial sites. Tell us about your building.

Contact us

Opticable installs and manages technology systems for commercial buildings in Montreal, Laval, Longueuil, the South Shore, the North Shore, the Laurentians, and across Quebec.
